output.summary: 10-layer transformer adds E2E TTT-Linear and a FlowRefiner after final LayerNorm, then uses per-row int6/int8 quant plus lzma to stay under the 16 MB cap.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Normal training on full shards; no validation-only training regime.
techniques: E2E TTT-Linear inner-loop per-head refinement applied post-LayerNorm
1-step latent FlowRefiner adds a gated residual correction
Per-row int6/int8 quantization with lzma-6 compression to meet the artifact budget
